title: hordeum coeleste var. barbatum
intro: Hordeum coeleste var. barbatum, also known as Barbed Spelt, is a subspecies of the Hordeum coeleste plant, which is a type of spelt grass native to Central Asia. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, with its seeds and leaves containing saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Barbed Spelt has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, with its extracts and preparations offering potential health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
